name: Creamy Ham Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam the broccoli until tender and rinse with cold water.
2. Melt butter in a large saucepan and stir in the flour until smooth.
3. Add milk slowly, stirring constantly. Cook until thickened.
4. Stir in the cheese and sour cream, continuing to cook until the cheese is melting.
5. Mix in the ham, mushrooms, and broccoli.
6. Place the mixture in a casserole pan and heat in the oven until hot and bubbly.
7. Serve over hot cooked rice.
